name: kotauth-frontend
description: CSS and JS build tooling for KotAuth. Not a Node.js app — only used at build time.

scripts.build: npm run build:css:admin && npm run build:css:auth && npm run build:js && npm run build:sri
scripts.watch: find css js -name '*.css' -o -name '*.js' | entr sh -c 'npm run build'
